'''鈭歴h-n-y-g''' ('''kashanyegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:photofunctionalize|photofunctionalize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-n-y-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:photofunctionalize|photofunctionalize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-n-y-g
|-
! Lemma
| kashanyegoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishanyegoko|thishanyegoko]] || [[word:jishanyegoko|jishanyegoko]] || [[word:shishanyegoko|shishanyegoko]] || [[word:kishanyegoko|kishanyegoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushanyegoko|thuthushanyegoko]] || [[word:jujushanyegoko|jujushanyegoko]] || [[word:shushushanyegoko|shushushanyegoko]] || [[word:kukushanyegoko|kukushanyegoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshanyegoko|thoshanyegoko]] || [[word:joshanyegoko|joshanyegoko]] || [[word:shoshanyegoko|shoshanyegoko]] || [[word:koshanyegoko|koshanyegoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shanyegoko|th忙shanyegoko]] || [[word:j忙shanyegoko|j忙shanyegoko]] || [[word:sh忙shanyegoko|sh忙shanyegoko]] || [[word:k忙shanyegoko|k忙shanyegoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashanyegoko|thashanyegoko]] || [[word:jashanyegoko|jashanyegoko]] || [[word:shashanyegoko|shashanyegoko]] || [[word:kashanyegoko|kashanyegoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
